items.name: confirm
items.title: Global Confirm
items.description: A global, stacked confirmation system with a promise-based API and async support.

items.name: inertia-pagination
items.title: Inertia Pagination
items.description: A pagination component optimized for Laravel and Inertia responses.

items.name: server-pagination
items.title: Server Pagination
items.description: A universal pagination component tailored for standard React, Next.js, and TanStack Router, supporting dynamic callbacks and relative SEO links.

items.name: search-select
items.title: Search Select
items.description: A beautiful searchable combobox supporting single/multi selection, custom avatars, description lines, and debounced API searching.

items.name: file-uploader
items.title: File Uploader
items.description: A beautiful drag-and-drop file uploader supporting local accumulation, direct async uploads, image blob thumbnails, and avatar profiles.

items.name: permission-guard
items.title: Permission Guard
items.description: A premium RBAC and wildcard permission gating suite supporting stealth unmounts, visual cloning disable modes, and glowing frosted-glass overlays.

items.name: table-toolbar
items.title: Table Toolbar
items.description: A beautiful reactive grid toolbar that smoothly morphs filters into bulk action trays or bottom floating consoles upon selecting records.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A fully-featured, generic data table built on TanStack Table v8. Supports server/client pagination, sorting, global search, column visibility with localStorage persistence, row selection, bulk actions, skeleton loading, and optional row/cell click handlers.

items.name: use-table-query
items.title: useTableQuery
items.description: A companion hook that wires @tanstack/react-query to a DataTable instance. Manages page, pageSize, debounced search, and sorting state — returns a spread-ready object for <DataTable />.

items.name: activity-timeline
items.title: Activity Timeline
items.description: A composable and data-driven timeline / stepper component system designed for municipal document routing histories, leave application steppers, and system audit logs.

items.name: document-viewer
items.title: Document Viewer
items.description: A feature-rich, responsive, and composable document viewing component system designed for Municipal LGU Document Management Systems, Ordinance Archives, and Purchase Request tracking.
